description: You are the operations dispatcher at FastPack Urban Deliveries, a last-mile courier company servicing the downtown core. Configure the Sygic GPS Navigation app for a new driver according to company policy: prioritize total distance over speed, avoid toll roads, and use metric measurements (kilometers). The GPS must guide the driver to arrive at delivery addresses on the correct side of the street. Create a vehicle profile for a compact delivery van named 'City Courier Van' (diesel, manufactured in 2021, Euro 6 emissions).
